targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(_ingested_at) AS time, 'silver_ingest' AS metric, count() / 60.0 AS value FROM network_health.silver_interface_stats_src WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

WITH ing AS (SELECT toStartOfMinute(_ingested_at) AS t, count() AS c FROM network_health.silver_interface_stats_src WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY t), dlq AS (SELECT toStartOfMinute(quarantined_at) AS t, count() AS c FROM network_health.silver_dlq_quarantine_src WHERE quarantined_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY t) SELECT ing.t AS time, 'DLQ %' AS metric, ifNull(dlq.c, 0) / greatest(toFloat64(ing.c) + ifNull(dlq.c, 0), 1.0) * 100 AS value FROM ing LEFT JOIN dlq ON ing.t = dlq.t ORDER BY time

SELECT now() AS time, 'silver_event_lag_s' AS metric, greatest(toFloat64(dateDiff('second', max(device_ts), now())), 0.0) AS value FROM network_health.silver_interface_stats_src WHERE device_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR UNION ALL SELECT now() AS time, 'silver_ingest_lag_s' AS metric, greatest(toFloat64(dateDiff('second', max(_ingested_at), now())), 0.0) AS value FROM network_health.silver_interface_stats_src WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR UNION ALL SELECT now() AS time, 'gold_anomaly_lag_s' AS metric, greatest(toFloat64(dateDiff('second', max(detected_at), now())), 0.0) AS value FROM network_health.gold_anomaly_flags FINAL WHERE detected_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

SELECT toStartOfMinute(_ingested_at) AS time, 'silver_ingest_p99_s' AS metric, quantileTDigest(0.99)(greatest(toFloat64(dateDiff('second', device_ts, _ingested_at)), 0.0)) AS value FROM network_health.silver_interface_stats_src WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND device_ts IS NOT NULL AND _ingested_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT toStartOfMinute(detected_at) AS time, 'gold_promote_p99_s' AS metric, quantileTDigest(0.99)(greatest(toFloat64(dateDiff('second', window_start, detected_at)), 0.0)) AS value FROM network_health.gold_anomaly_flags FINAL WHERE detected_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
